svg.text: core read microbenchmarks are inside gate; lookup_subjects is 38.2% faster than P12.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: prepared check is flat vs P14 and 28.3% faster than P12.

svg.text: full load is 1.6% faster than P14; compact zstd size holds the P14 result.
